m1-6-u5.title: Unit 5 There Was a Lot of Trash in the Sea

vocab.sentence: I visited my grandparents yesterday.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 我昨天拜訪了我的祖父母。

vocab.sentence: There was a lot of trash on the beach yesterday.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 昨天海灘上有很多垃圾。

vocab.sentence: We cleaned the trash after lunch.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 我們午餐後清理了垃圾。

vocab.sentence: They lived by the river two years ago.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 他們兩年前住在河邊。

vocab.sentence: Kevin visited the island last month.
vocab.sentence_chinese: Kevin 上個月拜訪了那座島。

vocab.sentence: There were many birds on the island last year.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 去年那座島上有很多鳥。

vocab.sentence: There was oil in the sea then.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 那時海裡有油。

vocab.sentence: The rain stopped at six last night.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 昨晚六點雨停了。

vocab.sentence: What happened at the playground yesterday?
vocab.sentence_chinese: 昨天操場發生了什麼事？

vocab.sentence: The plants were dead last week.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 那些植物上週都死了。

vocab.sentence: It was warm by the lake this afternoon.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 今天下午湖邊很溫暖。

vocab.sentence: The rainforest was beautiful five years ago.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 五年前那座雨林很美。

vocab.sentence: Many small fish died in the dirty river.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 很多小魚死在骯髒的河裡。

vocab.sentence: We were by the sea last Sunday.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 我們上週日在海邊。

vocab.sentence: I was busy then.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 我那時候很忙。

vocab.sentence: My parents were busy last weekend.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 我的父母上週末很忙。

vocab.sentence: The river was clean before.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 這條河以前很乾淨。

vocab.sentence: We camped by the lake last night.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 我們昨晚在湖邊露營。

vocab.sentence: There were many trees on the hill before.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 以前山丘上有很多樹。

vocab.sentence: They climbed the mountain yesterday morning.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 他們昨天早上爬了那座山。

vocab.sentence: We camped near the river two days ago.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 我們兩天前在河邊露營。

vocab.sentence: Ruby climbed a small hill last Saturday.
vocab.sentence_chinese: Ruby 上週六爬了一座小山丘。

vocab.sentence: The students planted trees last month.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 學生們上個月種了樹。

vocab.sentence: We hiked in the mountains last weekend.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 我們上週末在山裡健行。

vocab.sentence: They picnicked on the hill yesterday.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 他們昨天在山丘上野餐。

vocab.sentence: We cleaned the classroom last Friday.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 我們上週五打掃了教室。

vocab.sentence: My aunt lived in Kaohsiung before.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 我阿姨以前住在高雄。

vocab.sentence: The children played on the playground yesterday.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 孩子們昨天在操場上玩。

vocab.sentence: Everything changed little by little.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 每樣事物都一點一點地改變了。

vocab.sentence: The weather changed last night.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 天氣昨晚改變了。

vocab.sentence: The fire burned for two hours.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 那場火燒了兩個小時。

vocab.sentence: There was oil on the water yesterday.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 昨天水面上有油。

vocab.sentence: The man sold drinks by the beach.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 那名男子在海灘邊賣飲料。

vocab.sentence: I missed my old school last year.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 我去年想念我的舊學校。

vocab.sentence: There was a little dog near the lake.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 湖邊有一隻小狗。

vocab.sentence: We found a new way to clean the beach.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 我們找到了一個清理海灘的新方式。

phrases.sentence: There were a few boats on the lake yesterday.
The plants were dead. How come?
We rowed a boat on the lake yesterday.
They made money by selling drinks last summer.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 他們去年夏天靠賣飲料賺錢。

phrases.sentence: The island changed little by little.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 那座島一點一點地改變了。

tips.label: 過去時間
tips.text: 過去簡單式常搭配 yesterday、last night、two days ago、then、before 等時間副詞。

tips.label: be 動詞過去式
tips.text: am/is 的過去式是 was，are 的過去式是 were；否定句加 not。

tips.label: Yes/No 問句
tips.text: be 動詞問句把 was 或 were 放到主詞前面，例如 Was she busy yesterday?

tips.label: Wh- 問句
tips.text: Wh- 問句放在句首，後面接 was 或 were，再接主詞。

tips.label: 一般動詞過去式
tips.text: 規則動詞多半加 -ed；字尾是 e 加 -d；子音加 y 去 y 加 -ied；短母音加子音要重複字尾再加 -ed。

tips.label: 一般動詞否定句
tips.text: 過去式否定句用 didn't + 原形動詞，例如 We didn't clean the beach.

notes.title: 過去簡單式的使用時機
notes.rule: 用來表示過去的狀態、事實，或已經結束的動作。
notes.description: 句子常出現明確的過去時間，例如 yesterday、last weekend、two years ago、then、before。看到這些時間線索時，要把動詞改成過去式。
examples: I visited the beach yesterday.
They were by the lake two days ago.
The river was clean before.

notes.title: be 動詞過去式直述句
notes.rule: 主詞 + was/were (not) + 形容詞 / 名詞 / 地點 + 過去時間。
notes.description: I、he、she、it 和單數名詞用 was；you、we、they 和複數名詞用 were。否定時在 was/were 後面加 not，可縮寫成 wasn't 或 weren't。
examples: Leo was sad yesterday.
They weren't in the USA two months ago.
There was a lot of trash in the sea.

notes.title: be 動詞過去式 Yes/No 問句
notes.rule: Was/Were + 主詞 + 形容詞 / 名詞 / 地點 + 過去時間?
notes.description: 把 was 或 were 移到句首即可形成問句。簡答用 Yes, 主詞 + was/were. 或 No, 主詞 + wasn't/weren't.
examples: Was she a nurse three years ago?
Were you by the river at that time?
No, she wasn't. She was a student then.

notes.title: be 動詞過去式 Wh- 問句
notes.rule: Wh- + was/were + 主詞 + 其他?
notes.description: Wh- 問句的句型和現在式類似，只是 be 動詞改成 was 或 were。常見疑問詞包含 where、what、who、how。
examples: Where were you last Saturday?
What was the date yesterday?
Who was at home this morning?

notes.title: 規則動詞過去式變化
notes.rule: 一般加 -ed；字尾 e 加 -d；子音 + y 去 y 加 -ied；短母音 + 單子音重複字尾再加 -ed。
notes.description: 多數規則動詞直接加 -ed，例如 looked、washed。字尾為 e 的動詞只加 -d，例如 loved。study 變 studied，stop 變 stopped。若是母音 + y，直接加 -ed，例如 play 變 played。
examples: look -> looked
study -> studied
stop -> stopped
picnic -> picnicked

notes.title: 一般動詞過去式直述句與否定句
notes.rule: 肯定句：主詞 + 過去式動詞。否定句：主詞 + didn't + 原形動詞。
notes.description: 肯定句中的主要動詞要改成過去式；否定句用了 didn't 後，後面的動詞要回到原形。
examples: He watched a baseball game last night.
We didn't clean the house last weekend.
They didn't climb the mountain yesterday.

quiz.question: There _____ a lot of trash on the beach yesterday.
quiz.hint: trash 是不可數名詞，且時間是 yesterday，所以用 was。

quiz.question: My friends _____ by the lake last night.
quiz.hint: My friends 是複數主詞，過去式 be 動詞用 were。

quiz.question: He _____ the island two years ago.
quiz.hint: two years ago 是過去時間，visit 要改成 visited。

quiz.question: We didn't _____ the house last weekend.
quiz.hint: didn't 後面接原形動詞 clean。

quiz.question: _____ you at the playground this morning?
quiz.hint: you 的過去式 be 動詞問句用 Were。

quiz.question: The students _____ trees last month.
quiz.hint: last month 是過去時間，plant 變 planted。

quiz.question: Where _____ Helen last Sunday?
quiz.hint: Helen 是單數，過去式 be 動詞用 was。

quiz.question: The fire _____ for two hours yesterday.
quiz.hint: yesterday 表示過去，burn 的規則過去式是 burned。

quiz.question: It _____ warm by the sea yesterday afternoon.
quiz.hint: It 搭配過去式 be 動詞 was。

quiz.question: They _____ a boat on the lake yesterday.
quiz.hint: row 的過去式是 rowed。

quiz.question: The plants _____ dead last night.
quiz.hint: plants 是複數，過去式 be 動詞用 were。

quiz.question: I didn't _____ my old school last year.
quiz.hint: didn't 後面要接原形動詞 miss。

quiz.question: She _____ in Kaohsiung before.
quiz.hint: before 可表示過去時間，live 的過去式是 lived。

quiz.question: _____ there oil in the sea yesterday?
quiz.hint: oil 是不可數名詞，過去式問句用 Was there。

quiz.question: The children _____ on the playground yesterday.
quiz.hint: yesterday 是過去時間，play 直接加 -ed。

quiz.question: We _____ busy then.
quiz.hint: We 的過去式 be 動詞用 were。

quiz.question: The rain _____ at six last night.
quiz.hint: stop 是短母音 + 單子音，過去式重複 p 加 -ed：stopped。

quiz.question: What _____ at the river yesterday?
quiz.hint: 問過去發生的事，happen 要用 happened。

quiz.question: Leo _____ sad yesterday.
quiz.hint: Leo 是單數主詞，過去式 be 動詞用 was。

quiz.question: They didn't _____ the mountain yesterday.
quiz.hint: didn't 後面要用原形動詞 climb。

quiz.question: We _____ near the river two days ago.
quiz.hint: two days ago 是過去時間，camp 變 camped。

quiz.question: _____ you hungry this afternoon?
quiz.hint: you 的過去式 be 動詞問句用 Were。

quiz.question: Ruby _____ a small hill last Saturday.
quiz.hint: last Saturday 是過去時間，climb 變 climbed。

quiz.question: The river _____ clean before.
quiz.hint: The river 是單數，過去式 be 動詞用 was。

quiz.question: The weather _____ last night.
quiz.hint: change 字尾是 e，過去式加 -d：changed。

quiz.question: They _____ in the USA two months ago.
quiz.hint: They 搭配 weren't，two months ago 是過去時間。

quiz.question: Who _____ at home this morning?
quiz.hint: 詢問單數人物時，過去式 be 動詞用 was。

quiz.question: We didn't _____ any trash on the beach.
quiz.hint: didn't 後面接原形動詞 clean。

quiz.question: The man _____ drinks by the beach last summer.
quiz.hint: sell 的過去式是 sold。

quiz.question: There _____ many trees on the hill before.
quiz.hint: many trees 是複數，過去式用 were。

quiz.question: They _____ the mountain yesterday morning.
quiz.hint: yesterday morning 是過去時間，climb 變 climbed。

quiz.question: My aunt _____ in Kaohsiung five years ago.
quiz.hint: five years ago 是過去時間，live 變 lived。

quiz.question: They _____ on the hill yesterday.
quiz.hint: picnic 的過去式是 picnicked。

quiz.question: _____ she a student then?
quiz.hint: she 的 be 動詞過去式問句用 Was。

quiz.question: The rainforest _____ beautiful five years ago.
quiz.hint: The rainforest 是單數，過去式用 was。

quiz.question: We didn't _____ a new way then.
quiz.hint: didn't 後面接原形動詞 find。

quiz.question: Everything _____ little by little.
quiz.hint: 描述過去的改變時，change 用 changed。

quiz.question: The little dog _____ near the lake yesterday.
quiz.hint: The little dog 是單數，過去式 be 動詞用 was。

quiz.question: What _____ the date yesterday?
quiz.hint: the date 是單數，yesterday 要用 was。

quiz.question: I _____ my homework last night.
quiz.hint: last night 是過去時間，finish 變 finished。

quiz.question: We _____ the classroom last Friday.
quiz.hint: last Friday 是過去時間，clean 加 -ed。

quiz.question: The girls _____ by the river at that time.
quiz.hint: The girls 是複數，過去式 be 動詞用 were。

quiz.question: He _____ English last night.
quiz.hint: study 是子音 + y，過去式去 y 加 -ied：studied。

quiz.question: She didn't _____ the door yesterday.
quiz.hint: didn't 後面接原形動詞 open。

quiz.question: The baby _____ last night.
quiz.hint: cry 是子音 + y，過去式去 y 加 -ied：cried。

quiz.question: We _____ in the mountains last weekend.
quiz.hint: hike 字尾是 e，過去式加 -d：hiked。

quiz.question: A: Were you by the sea last Sunday? B: Yes, we _____.
quiz.hint: Were you...? 的肯定簡答可用 Yes, we were.

quiz.question: A: Was she busy then? B: No, she _____.
quiz.hint: Was she...? 的否定簡答是 No, she wasn't.

quiz.question: There _____ a few boats on the lake yesterday.
quiz.hint: a few boats 是複數，所以用 were。

quiz.question: They _____ money by selling drinks last summer.
quiz.hint: make 的過去式是不規則變化 made。

grammar.sentence_chinese: 我們找到了一個幫助海洋的更好方式。

m1-6-u6.title: Unit 6 - I Took a Trip to India Last Month

vocab.sentence: We arrived at the airport early yesterday.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 我們昨天很早到機場。

vocab.sentence: My family traveled to India last month.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 我家上個月去印度旅行。

vocab.sentence: Tina took a rest after lunch.
vocab.sentence_chinese: Tina 午餐後休息了一下。

vocab.sentence: The guide took us to the hotel.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 導遊帶我們去飯店。

vocab.sentence: They stayed at a clean hotel near the station.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 他們住在車站附近一間乾淨的飯店。

vocab.sentence: The plane left at seven this morning.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 飛機今天早上 7 點起飛。

vocab.sentence: We saw the sights in the old city.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 我們在古城看了名勝。

vocab.sentence: I went to a bookstore and bought a map.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 我去了一家書店並買了一張地圖。

vocab.sentence: Dad bought two cups of lassi for us.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 爸爸買了兩杯拉西給我們。

vocab.sentence: I just saw Kevin at the market.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 我剛才在市場看到 Kevin。

vocab.sentence: We learned a lot about Indian culture.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 我們學到了很多關於印度文化的事。

vocab.sentence: Grandpa told us a story about the temple.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 爺爺告訴我們一個關於那座寺廟的故事。

vocab.sentence: The movie about India was cool.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 那部關於印度的電影很酷。

vocab.sentence: We took a train to the city.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 我們搭火車去那座城市。

vocab.sentence: The drink was cold and sweet.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 那杯飲料又冰又甜。

vocab.sentence: I tried lassi for the first time.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 我第一次試喝拉西。

vocab.sentence: The station was a long way from our hotel.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 車站離我們的飯店很遠。

vocab.sentence: The train stopped at the station.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 火車停在車站。

vocab.sentence: Mom bought a bag at the department store.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 媽媽在百貨公司買了一個包包。

vocab.sentence: We ate dinner at an Indian restaurant.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 我們在一家印度餐廳吃晚餐。

vocab.sentence: They saw a movie at the theater last night.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 他們昨晚在電影院看了一部電影。

vocab.sentence: We walked through the market in the morning.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 我們早上走過市場。

vocab.sentence: The old temple stood near the river.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 那座古老的寺廟位在河邊。

vocab.sentence: The Taj Mahal is a famous place in India.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 泰姬瑪哈陵是印度有名的地方。

vocab.sentence: We took many photos during the trip.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 我們在旅途中拍了很多照片。

vocab.sentence: Besides the temple, we visited a market.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 除了寺廟之外，我們也參觀了一個市場。

vocab.sentence: The story changed with age.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 那個故事隨著時間改變。

vocab.sentence: Ben lost his ticket at the airport.
vocab.sentence_chinese: Ben 在機場弄丟了他的票。

vocab.sentence: The baby cried on the plane.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 那個嬰兒在飛機上哭了。

vocab.sentence: The cat hid under the sofa.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 那隻貓躲在沙發下面。

vocab.sentence: Workers built the bridge many years ago.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 工人們很多年前建造了那座橋。

vocab.sentence: Our trip to India was exciting.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 我們的印度之旅很令人興奮。

vocab.sentence: Sadly, we lost our camera during the trip.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 令人傷心的是，我們在旅途中弄丟了相機。

vocab.sentence: The show lasted two hours.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 那場表演持續了 2 個小時。

phrases.sentence: I went to a bookstore the other day.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 我前幾天去了一家書店。

phrases.sentence: Victor fell in love with Anna.

tips.label: 過去時間
tips.text: 句子有 yesterday、last month、the other day、ago 等過去時間時，主要動詞通常要用過去式。

tips.label: 規則變化
tips.text: 多數動詞過去式加 -ed，例如 visit 變 visited，try 變 tried，cry 變 cried。

tips.label: 不規則變化
tips.text: 有些動詞過去式不加 -ed，要另外記，例如 go 變 went，take 變 took，buy 變 bought。

tips.label: 問句與否定
tips.text: 過去式問句與否定句用 did 或 didn't，後面的主要動詞要改回原形。

notes.title: 一般動詞過去簡單式
notes.rule: 主詞 + 過去式動詞 + 過去時間.
notes.description: 用來表示過去某個時間發生的動作或狀態。句中常出現 yesterday、last night、last month、the other day、two days ago、during the trip 等時間線索。
examples: I took a trip to India last month.
We visited a famous temple yesterday.
They bought two cups of lassi the other day.

notes.title: 規則動詞過去式
notes.rule: 一般加 -ed；字尾為 e 加 -d；子音 + y 改 y 為 i 再加 -ed。
notes.description: 規則動詞的過去式有固定拼字規則，例如 learn -> learned、try -> tried、cry -> cried、last -> lasted。
examples: We learned a lot about India.
I tried lassi at the restaurant.
The show lasted two hours.

notes.title: 不規則動詞過去式
notes.rule: 不規則動詞的過去式需要記憶，例如 take -> took、go -> went、buy -> bought、see -> saw、eat -> ate。
notes.description: 本課常見的不規則動詞包含 take、buy、go、get、see、eat、hide、build、lose、fall、sit、make、think、read 等。
examples: We took a train to the city.
I went to a bookstore and bought a book.
Ben lost his ticket at the airport.

notes.title: 過去式問句
notes.rule: Did + 主詞 + 原形動詞 ...?
notes.description: 過去式問句用 Did 開頭，主要動詞要用原形，不可以再用過去式。
examples: Did you see any cats around here?
Did they take a plane to India?
Did Amy buy a book at the bookstore?

notes.title: 過去式否定句
notes.rule: 主詞 + didn't + 原形動詞 ...
notes.description: 過去式否定句用 didn't，後面的主要動詞同樣要用原形。
examples: I didn't see Kevin at the market.
They didn't take a rest after lunch.
She didn't buy anything at the department store.

quiz.question: I ___ a trip to India last month.
quiz.hint: last month 是過去時間，take 的過去式是 took。

quiz.question: We ___ at the airport early yesterday.
quiz.hint: yesterday 表過去，arrive 是規則動詞，加 -d。

quiz.question: Dad ___ two cups of lassi for us.
quiz.hint: buy 的過去式是 bought。

quiz.question: Did you ___ any cats around here?
quiz.hint: Did 後面要接原形動詞 see。

quiz.question: The baby ___ on the plane.
quiz.hint: cry 的過去式要改 y 為 i，再加 -ed。

quiz.question: They ___ at a clean hotel near the station.
quiz.hint: stay 是規則動詞，過去式是 stayed。

quiz.question: We ___ a train to the city yesterday.
quiz.hint: take 的過去式是 took。

quiz.question: Amy didn't ___ anything at the department store.
quiz.hint: didn't 後面要接原形動詞 buy。

quiz.question: Ben ___ his ticket at the airport.
quiz.hint: lose 的過去式是 lost。

quiz.question: The cat ___ under the sofa.
quiz.hint: hide 的過去式是 hid。

quiz.question: I ___ to a bookstore the other day.
quiz.hint: go 的過去式是 went。

quiz.question: Did they ___ a famous temple in India?
quiz.hint: Did 後面要接原形動詞 visit。

quiz.question: Workers ___ the bridge many years ago.
quiz.hint: build 的過去式是 built。

quiz.question: We ___ dinner at an Indian restaurant.
quiz.hint: eat 的過去式是 ate。

quiz.question: The train ___ at the station.
quiz.hint: stop 是規則動詞，過去式 stopped。

quiz.question: She didn't ___ a rest after lunch.
quiz.hint: didn't 後面要接原形動詞 take。

quiz.question: We ___ many photos during the trip.
quiz.hint: 過去發生的事要用 took。

quiz.question: The show ___ two hours.
quiz.hint: last 當動詞時，過去式是 lasted。

quiz.question: I ___ lassi for the first time.
quiz.hint: try 的過去式要改 y 為 i，再加 -ed。

quiz.question: Did Anna ___ in love with Victor?
quiz.hint: Did 後面用原形 fall。

quiz.question: Victor ___ in love with Anna.
quiz.hint: fall 的過去式是 fell。

quiz.question: The old temple ___ near the river.
quiz.hint: stand 的過去式是 stood。

quiz.question: We ___ the sights in the old city.
quiz.hint: see 的過去式是 saw。

quiz.question: They didn't ___ the plane this morning.
quiz.hint: didn't 後面接原形動詞 take。

quiz.question: The guide ___ us to the hotel.
quiz.hint: take 的過去式是 took。

quiz.question: We ___ a lot about Indian culture.
quiz.hint: learn 是規則動詞，過去式 learned。

quiz.question: Grandpa ___ us a story about the temple.
quiz.hint: tell 的過去式是 told。

quiz.question: Did you ___ a movie at the theater last night?
quiz.hint: Did 問句後面接原形 see。

quiz.question: The plane ___ at seven this morning.
quiz.hint: leave 的過去式是 left。

quiz.question: They ___ a movie at the theater last night.
quiz.hint: see 的過去式是 saw。

quiz.question: I ___ Kevin at the market the other day.
quiz.hint: meet 的過去式是 met。

quiz.question: She didn't ___ to India last month.
quiz.hint: didn't 後面要用原形 go。

quiz.question: The drink ___ cold and sweet.
quiz.hint: 單數主詞 the drink 的過去 be 動詞是 was。

quiz.question: Besides the temple, we ___ a market.
quiz.hint: 過去的參觀行為用 visited。

quiz.question: Mom ___ a bag at the department store.
quiz.hint: buy 的過去式是 bought。

quiz.question: Did the trip ___ two days?
quiz.hint: Did 問句後面接原形 last。

quiz.question: I ___ a black cat on the street.
quiz.hint: see 的過去式是 saw。

quiz.question: My friend and I ___ a horse on the farm.
quiz.hint: ride 的過去式是 rode。

quiz.question: Where did you ___ after lunch?
quiz.hint: did 後面要接原形 go。

quiz.question: I ___ a walk at the park.
quiz.hint: take a walk 的過去式是 took a walk。

quiz.question: The color of the walls ___ at different times of the day.
quiz.hint: 若描述過去觀察到的變化，可用 changed。

quiz.question: Penny ___ a plane on her notebook yesterday.
quiz.hint: draw 的過去式是 drew。

quiz.question: Kevin ___ cold during the trip.
quiz.hint: feel 的過去式是 felt。

quiz.question: Did Victor ___ a train to the station?
quiz.hint: Did 問句後面用原形 take。

quiz.question: We ___ to the hotel after dinner.
quiz.hint: go 的過去式是 went。

quiz.question: They ___ at the restaurant for an hour.
quiz.hint: sit 的過去式是 sat。

quiz.question: The singer ___ a beautiful song last night.
quiz.hint: sing 的過去式是 sang。

quiz.question: They didn't ___ dinner at the hotel.
quiz.hint: didn't 後面要接原形 eat。

quiz.question: The girl ___ a letter about her trip.
quiz.hint: write 的過去式是 wrote。

quiz.question: Did you ___ your camera during the trip?
quiz.hint: Did 後面要用原形 lose。
